verses.1: The words of Jeremiah the son of Hilkiah, one of the priests who were in Anathoth in the land of Benjamin.
verses.2: The LORD’s word came to him in the days of Josiah the son of Amon, king of Judah, in the thirteenth year of his reign.
verses.3: It came also in the days of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, to the end of the eleventh year of Zedekiah, the son of Josiah, king of Judah, to the carrying away of Jerusalem captive in the fifth month.
verses.4: Now the LORD’s word came to me, saying,
verses.5: “Before I formed you in the womb, I knew you.
verses.6: Then I said, “Ah, Lord GOD! Behold, I don’t know how to speak; for I am a child.”
verses.7: But the LORD said to me, “Don’t say, ‘I am a child;’ for you must go to whomever I send you, and you must say whatever I command you.
verses.8: Don’t be afraid because of them, for I am with you to rescue you,” says the LORD.
verses.9: Then the LORD stretched out his hand and touched my mouth. Then the LORD said to me, “Behold, I have put my words in your mouth.
verses.10: Behold, I have today set you over the nations and over the kingdoms, to uproot and to tear down, to destroy and to overthrow, to build and to plant.”
verses.11: Moreover the LORD’s word came to me, saying, “Jeremiah, what do you see?”
verses.12: Then the LORD said to me, “You have seen well; for I watch over my word to perform it.”
verses.13: The LORD’s word came to me the second time, saying, “What do you see?”
verses.14: Then the LORD said to me, “Out of the north, evil will break out on all the inhabitants of the land.
verses.15: For behold, I will call all the families of the kingdoms of the north,” says the LORD.
verses.16: I will utter my judgments against them concerning all their wickedness,
verses.17: “You therefore put your belt on your waist, arise, and say to them all that I command you. Don’t be dismayed at them, lest I dismay you before them.
verses.18: For behold, I have made you today a fortified city, an iron pillar, and bronze walls against the whole land—against the kings of Judah, against its princes, against its priests, and against the people of the land.
verses.19: They will fight against you, but they will not prevail against you; for I am with you”, says the LORD, “to rescue you.”
